ModMetaData.name: Xenotype Summary
ModMetaData.author: Waggish Pluto
ModMetaData.description:
Ever felt lost in the wall of text that is a complex xenotype? Xenotype Summary provides a clean, organized overview of everything a xenotype actually DOES.
Inspired by Mr. Samuel Streamer to help navigate the genetic chaos!
Features: - Full Description List: Read all gene descriptions and custom effects in one scrollable list. - Aggregated Stats: See total offsets and multipliers for stats, capacities, and damage factors. - Breakdown Tooltips: Hover over any aggregated stat to see exactly which genes are contributing to the value. - Chemical & Global Factors: Summary of pain, resource loss, and chemical modifiers. - Work & Mood: Consolidated list of disabled work types and nullified thoughts. - Abilities & Traits: Quick reference for all gained abilities and forced/suppressed traits. - Universal Access: Accessible from the Pawn Gene tab, Info Cards, Xenotype Editor, and Gene Assembler.
No more hovering over 50 icons to figure out why your colonist is glowing or why they're suddenly immune to fire. One button, one summary, total clarity.
